creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Hi Frederic,
> 
> You're looking at the requirements for POE-Component-Server-IRC
> v1.48 which was released last night. The patch is for
> POE-Component-Server-IRC v1.47 which has a dependancy against
> p5-POE-Component-IRC v6.51.

Are you sure? I thought Masahiro approved the second patch which is an update
for v1.48.
Which patch do you want me to commit then? Is it ok to commit the first one for
v1.47 while waiting for the o5-POE-Component-IRC to be updated?
